name: Mazboot Storage Drum
shortDescription: Roz ke use ke liye best
headline: Paani aur anaaj store karne ke liye perfect
description: Yeh drum paani aur anaaj store karne ke liye perfect hai. Iska material strong hai aur leak-proof design hai, jisse paani ya samaan safe rehta hai. Gaon mein roz ke use ke liye yeh bahut useful hai, chahe paani store karna ho ya anaaj bachake rakhna ho. Mazboot plastic se bana hai jo long time tak chalega.

name: Solar LED Light
headline: Bijli ke bina bhi bright roshni
description: Yeh solar light bijli ke bina bhi kaam karti hai. Din mein charge hoti hai aur raat mein bright roshni deti hai. Gaon ke areas jahan light problem hoti hai, wahan yeh best solution hai. Battery backup 6-8 ghante tak deta hai aur bahut simple use hai.

price.note: Model aur brightness ke hisaab se daam alag

useCases: Ghar ke andar roshni ke liye
Kheti mein kaam karte samay
Bahar ke courtyard mein
Emergency lighting ke liye
